name: Terminids
description: The four primary factions found inHelldivers 2are theTerminids, theAutomatons, theIlluminate, and theSuper Earth Federation.

principal.name: Scavenger
principal.description: The lowliest of Terminids, slow and weak, but capable of attracting nearby bug breaches.

principal.name: Bile Spitter
principal.description: One of the smallest Terminids, but still deadly with its ranged acid spit.

principal.name: Pouncer
principal.description: Agile Terminids that are able to leap great distances to attack Helldivers.

principal.name: Hunter
principal.description: Stealthy Terminids engaging in ambush tactics, able to leap great distances and slow Helldivers with their tongue.

principal.name: Shrieker
principal.description: Flying Terminids specialized in hit-and-run tactics.

principal.name: Warrior
principal.description: Medium sized Terminid adept in close-quarters combat.

principal.name: Bile Warrior
principal.description: A mutated variant of the Warrior that explodes upon death.

principal.name: Alpha Warrior
principal.description: A faster and deadlier variant of the Warrior. Spawned by Alpha Commanders.

principal.name: Hive Guard
principal.description: A variant of the Warrior with medium armor covering its head and legs.

principal.name: Nursing Spewer
principal.description: A sluggish, medium armored Terminid that can spew corrosive bile over a wide area.

principal.name: Bile Spewer
principal.description: An armored variant of the Nursing Spewer capable of launching Bile mortars.

principal.name: Brood Commander
principal.description: Leadership-class Terminid capable of coordinating attacks and deploying reinforcements.

principal.name: Alpha Commander
principal.description: A heavier variant of the Brood Commander, capable of calling in Alpha Warriors.

principal.name: Stalker
principal.description: A specialized Terminid capable of turning partially invisible and ambushing Helldivers. Spawns fromStalker Lairs.

principal.name: Charger
principal.description: Fast-moving Terminid specialized in charging attacks. Covered head to claw in heavy armor.

principal.name: Spore Charger
principal.description: A Charger variant that creates a thick fog and a massive explosion on death.

principal.name: Charger Behemoth
principal.description: A Charger variant with even more durable armor.

principal.name: Impaler
principal.description: Heavily armored Terminid that uses large, bladed tentacles to disrupt Helldiver movements.

principal.name: Bile Titan
principal.description: Massive Terminid with a potent bile attack, stomp attacks, and heavy armor.

principal.name: Dragonroach
principal.description: Massive flying Terminid with a potent fire breath attack and heavy armor.

principal.name: Hive Lord
principal.description: Gigantic Terminid capable of traversing underground, expelling bile and crushing targets with its body weight.

Predator Strain.name: Predator Hunter
Predator Strain.description: A mutated variant of the Hunter that is significantly more aggressive, capable of cloaking, and can spew bile.

Predator Strain.name: Predator Stalker
Predator Strain.description: A mutated, more aggresive variant of the Stalker that is unable to cloak but spawns as a regular part of patrols.

Spore Burst Strain.name: Spore Burst Scavenger
Spore Burst Strain.description: A mutated variant of the Scavenger that explodes into a deadly spore cloud upon death.

Spore Burst Strain.name: Spore Burst Warrior
Spore Burst Strain.description: A mutated variant of the Warrior that explodes into a deadly spore cloud upon death.

Spore Burst Strain.name: Spore Burst Hunter
Spore Burst Strain.description: A mutated variant of the Hunter that explodes into a deadly spore cloud upon death.

Rupture Strain.name: Rupture Warrior
Rupture Strain.description: A burrowing variant of the Warrior.

Rupture Strain.name: Rupture Spewer
Rupture Strain.description: A burrowing variant of the Bile Spewer capable of launching Bile mortars.

Rupture Strain.name: Rupture Charger
Rupture Strain.description: A burrowing variant of the Charger.

name: Automatons
description: TheRupture Strainis a subfaction of the Terminids,  exclusive to Terminid Hive Worlds. They burrow underground to reach Helldivers, specializing in speed and ambush tactics.

principal.name: Trooper
principal.description: Light Automaton units armed with fusion rifles and explosive grenades.

principal.name: Brawler
principal.description: Light Automaton unit armed with twin blades that specializes in close quarters combat.

principal.name: Commissar
principal.description: Light Automaton squad leader armed with sidearm and blade for versatile offensive options.

principal.name: Rocket Raider
principal.description: Light Automaton unit armed with a rocket launcher.

principal.name: Marauder
principal.description: Reinforced Automaton units armed with fusion rifles and explosive grenades.

principal.name: MG Raider
principal.description: Reinforced Automaton units armed with fusion machine guns, explosive grenades, and a volatile backpack with a tendency to explode.

principal.name: Berserker
principal.description: Durable Automaton units armed with dual chainsaws that specialize in close quarters combat.

principal.name: Devastator
principal.description: Medium-armored Automaton units armed with fusion arm cannons.

principal.name: Rocket Devastator
principal.description: Devastator variant armed with fusion arm cannons and shoulder-mounted rocket launchers, capable of hitting Helldivers behind cover.

principal.name: Heavy Devastator
principal.description: Devastator variant armed with a fusion machine gun and a large shield, capable of suppressing Helldivers and blocking incoming fire.

principal.name: Scout Strider
principal.description: Armored Automaton recon walker, armed with a heavy fusion machine gun and manned by a single Trooper shielded from small arms fire from the front.

principal.name: Reinforced Scout Strider
principal.description: A reinforced variant of the Scout Strider armed with rockets and armor surrounding the entire pilot.

principal.name: Hulk Obliterator
principal.description: Large, heavily armored Automaton unit armed with dual rocket launchers.

principal.name: Hulk Scorcher
principal.description: Hulk variant armed with a heavy flamethrower and large sawblade, specializing in close quarters combat.

principal.name: Hulk Bruiser
principal.description: Hulk variant equipped with a burst rocket launcher and fusion autocannon.

principal.name: War Strider
principal.description: Heavily armored Automaton walker units armed with heavy fusion repeaters and explosive grenade launchers.

principal.name: Annihilator Tank
principal.description: Tank-armored Automaton unit armed with fusion repeaters and a large cannon.

principal.name: Shredder Tank
principal.description: Tank variant armed with a quad-barreled fusion autocannon.

principal.name: Barrager Tank
principal.description: Tank variant armed with a large missile array capable of direct & mortar fire.

principal.name: Gunship
principal.description: Medium-armored flying Automaton unit armed with fusion machine guns and rockets.

principal.name: Dropship
principal.description: Unarmed Automaton ships that drop in fellow Automaton units in response to a Bot Drop flare.

principal.name: Factory Strider
principal.description: Massive Automaton quad-walker, armed with twin fusion gatling guns and a large burst-cannon. Capable of creating and deploying squads ofDevastators.

Jet Brigade.name: Assault Raider
Jet Brigade.description: Light Automaton units armed with fusion pistols, a blade, and a jetpack.

Jet Brigade.name: Jet Brigade Devastator
Jet Brigade.description: Devastator variant equipped with a jetpack for leaping large distances.

Jet Brigade.name: Jet Brigade Hulk
Jet Brigade.description: Hulk variant equipped with a large jetpack, allowing them to leap great distances.

Incineration Corps.name: Pyro Trooper
Incineration Corps.description: Reinforced Automaton units armed with a flamethrower backpack-mounted fuel tank.

Incineration Corps.name: Incendiary MG Devastator
Incineration Corps.description: Heavy Devastator variant with a slower firing incendiary fusion machine gun

Incineration Corps.name: Conflagration Devastator
Incineration Corps.description: Devastator variant armed with an incendiary fusion shotgun and a large shield, capable of suppressing Helldivers and blocking incoming fire.

Incineration Corps.name: Hulk Firebomber
Incineration Corps.description: Hulk variant equipped with a large flamethrower and incendiary grenade launcher.

name: Illuminate
description: TheIncineration Corpsare a subfaction of the Automatons, primarily utilizing flame weaponry.

principal.name: Voteless
principal.description: An Agile skirmisher unit that attacks in hordes.

principal.name: Watcher
principal.description: Flying drone equipped with arc weaponry and the ability to call for reinforcements.

principal.name: Overseer
principal.description: Elite unit equipped with an energy shield and a deadly lance capable of launching an explosive projectile, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.

principal.name: Elevated Overseer
principal.description: Elite unit equipped with automatic plasma rifles and jet-packs, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.

principal.name: Crescent Overseer
principal.description: Elite unit equipped with a large plasma cannon, capable of direct & mortar fire, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.

principal.name: Fleshmob
principal.description: An amalgamation of Voteless corpses, this large Illuminate unit specializes in close quarters combat and charges at Helldivers to attack.

principal.name: Harvester
principal.description: Massive autonomous tripod with an energy shield and a large laser weapon. Can also use arc weaponry in close-quarters.

principal.name: Stingray
principal.description: Flying Illuminate unit that deploys strafing runs against Helldivers, dealing massive damage over a large area.

principal.name: Warp Ship
principal.description: Transport aircraft used for deploying reinforcements for the Illuminate.

principal.name: Leviathan
principal.description: Tank-armored flying Illuminate unit, armed with large plasma cannons and bomb bays.

principal.name: Illuminate Overship
principal.description: Unarmed host ships, these units act as command centers for Illuminate ground forces.

principal.name: Civilian
principal.description: Unarmed Super Earth citizens, mostly found running away from danger.

principal.name: SEAF Soldier
principal.description: Lightly-armored Super Earth ground troops, armed with assault rifles and explosive grenades.

principal.name: Helldiver
principal.description: Super Earth's elite fighting force, these units can be equipped with a variety of weapons, stratagems, and employ a variety of tactics.
